BuyerGuide.title: A Safe Home-Buying Journey
BuyerGuide.intro: Buying on the Costa del Sol is straightforward when you know the steps. Here's how we guide you from first viewing to the day you collect the keys.

steps.s1Body: Every foreign buyer needs a Número de Identidad de Extranjero (NIE) — a Spanish tax identification number. We help you arrange it before you buy.
steps.s2Body: A local account makes paying for the property, taxes and utilities far simpler. We can introduce you to English-speaking banks.
steps.s3Body: A reservation contract takes the property off the market. Your independent lawyer then checks ownership, debts and licences.
steps.s4Body: Usually signed with a 10% deposit, this fixes the price and completion date and sets out the terms for both parties.
steps.s5Body: The title deed (escritura) is signed before a notary, the balance is paid, and the keys are yours.

SellerGuide.title: Thinking of Selling?
SellerGuide.intro: We put your property in front of the right buyers through our international network, with clear communication in English throughout.

points.p1Body: We price your property against real, current market evidence — not guesswork.
points.p2Body: Your listing is marketed to qualified buyers across the UK and Europe, in their own language.
points.p3Body: From photography and paperwork to negotiation and notary, we manage the process for you.

About.title: Your dedicated partner on the coast
About.body: The Shore Estates is a boutique agency focused on the Costa del Sol. We offer personal service and clear, English-language guidance from first enquiry to completion — and long after.
